title: Luffy Tries to Recruit Chopper
description: On pages 12–14, luffy tries to recruit chopper as nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him.
scene: Luffy Tries to Recruit Chopper. Nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: from the moment of his birth,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He was abandoned by his parents who thought of him as repulsive.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: All because of that blue nose of his...!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Despite being a newborn baby,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: He was forced to tail his herd all alone at the back.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's awful...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And one day,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He happened to eat a devil fruit, which singles him out even more as an abomination.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: His fellow reminders soon chased him away for good.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He couldn't even call himself a Reindeer anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Even so, he still desired companions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So he then tried to find acceptance among humans in a nearby town...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: However, his humankind-form wasn't quite human either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A fact made only too clear by his blue nose.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What in God's name is that...?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Whatever it is, it's giving me the creeps! Get the children safely back in their homes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That must be an abominable snowman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Bring the guns! Hurry! shoot him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go away, you mon-ster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: roz-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: clueless as to what he did wrong,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and confused as to what he could blame...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All he wanted were friends to live among, yet for that he was called a monster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Neither a Reindeer nor Human...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's had to endure a life of loneliness since then...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Can you pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Possibly hope to fix that scar of his heart...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The main door's been left open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No wonder it's freezing in here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go close it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Otherwise, there's no difference being outside or inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So this is why there were gusts of wind coming to our rooms in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't touch that door!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just ignore him,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm freezing my nips off in here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah, you said it..

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I told you to stop!

summary: This part centers on luffy tries to recruit chopper, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
